# scripts/insurance_backfill_orphan_ai.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-12T10:00:11Z

## Purpose
Back-fill orphan AI references into bp.ai_opportunities[].

Per §73.3a — every AI in process.automatic_process.ai_workflow + process.ai[].ai_type
MUST exist in the catalog. Operator picks from catalog vocabulary, never free text.

This script finds orphans and adds them as `derived: true` catalog entries with the
5 mandatory sub-sections (Data / Model / Accuracy / Benchmark / Stakeholder) per §73.3b.

Idempotent: re-running NEVER overwrites operator content.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import json
- from `pathlib` import Path

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `collect_orphans(bp)`: Return (orphan_set, first_occurrence_map). Covers process-level + top20_roi refs.
- `derived_catalog_entry(ai_type, ctx)`: Build a §73.3b-compliant derived catalog entry for an orphan AI type.
- `main()`: (no docstring)

## Outputs
- Writes files (detected 1 patterns)
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- Process-level refs
- top20_roi refs (per §73.3a — also expected to resolve to catalog)
